chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-58 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 19-03-2025 Mr. Ali Gohar Shar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w Altaf Hussain (respondent No.8). **** Learned AAG files comments on behalf of respondents No.6&8, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioner. Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed as under: (i) This Hon’ble Court may be pleased to call the complete date/record of the Water Course No.35-L Sathio Wah district Khairpur. (ii) That this Hon’ble Court may be pleased to direct the concerned respondents to reconstruct said watercourse with proper design and proper flow of water as early as possible”. Respondents No.6&8 are present and submit that the subject scheme, to which the construction work of watercourse was carried out, has been ended in the year 2021. Therefore, this Court cannot issue any direction for reconstruct of the said watercourse. Accordingly, this petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
